title: Samuel's Re-Chipped
description: An up and coming redesign of (most of) the base textures from the Chipped mod, aimed at providing a distinct theme to each block set, each with various unique blocks!
body:
You ever use Chipped, and loved the way it's presented and organized, but disliked some of the textures? Well, you're in luck! This texture pack aims to vastly overhaul the look of a majority of the mod.

From providing blocks a new color palette, to giving them a unique texture noise, to giving them brand new block designs entirely, rest assured each block will stand out in their own, entirely unique way!


IMPORTANT NOTE!!: This texture pack is currently a work in progress! Currently, the latest version of this texture pack affects; Tuff, Prismarine, Dark Prismarine, Calcite, Deepslate

Additionally, this texture pack utilizes the Optifine texture format - please use Continuity with this pack. (Continuity will work on Forge with Syntra Connector)
____________________________________________________________________________________________

THIRD PARTY CREDIT: This texture pack occasionally adapts and uses textures from third party sources. All textures used have been permited by the original artist/mod team, specific credit and links below.

-Prismarine:

"Prismarine Bricks" and "Prismarine Tiles" are taken from the Rechisled mod

"Mini Prismarine Scales", the top texture for "Simple Prismarine Pillar", and the common texture used for every Prismarine Pillar was made by the artist Fungal

-Dark Prismarine:

"Dark Prismarine Bricks", "Dark Prismarine Tiles", and "Polished Dark Prismarine" were modified, but originally derived from the Rechiseled mod

The top texture for "Simple Prismarine Pillar" and the common texture used for every Dark Prismarine Pillar was made by the artist Fungal

-Calcite:

"Calite Bricks", "Chiseled Calcite Bricks", and "Polished Calcite" were made by the artist Qzimyion

"Chiseled Calcite" was modified, but originally derived from Qzimyion

-Deepslate:

"Warden Deepslate Carving", "Masive Weathered Deepslate Tiles", the top texture for "Simple Deepslate Pillar", "Curly Deepslate Pillar", and the common texture used for every Deepslate Pillar was made by the artist Fungal

"Tiny Chiseled Bricks", "Deepslate Tiles", and "Weathered Deepslate" were modified, but originally derived from the artist Fungal

LINKS:

Rechiseled - https://modrinth.com/mod/rechiseled

Fungal - https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/_fungal_/

https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/fungus-s-new-blocks-51-new-vanilla-blocks/
